name: uniride
description: UniRide — Smart Electric Tricycle Booking Platform for UNIBEN

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "magenta,cyan" "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start -w apps/api" "npm run start -w apps/web"
